query:
SELECT u.name, u.id, cp.id as phase_id, cp.label, cp.start_date, cp.end_date
FROM client_phases cp
JOIN users u ON u.id = cp.client_id
WHERE u.name LIKE '%Jake%' OR u.email LIKE '%jake%'
ORDER BY cp.start_date;
